title: STAT+: Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T is nearing an early but pivotal study readout
summary: A preliminary readout from a study could vindicate Allogene Therapeutics' stubborn belief in its off-the-shelf CAR-T treatment.
summary_ko: Allogene의 오프-더-쉘프 CAR-T 치료제가 임상 시험 결과를 발표할 예정이다.

title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium — which one analyst described as a "steal" — may leave room for a competing bid.
summary_ko: Merck는 Terns를 67억 달러에 인수하여 백혈병 치료제를 개발하고자 한다.

title: Philips AI cath lab copilot nets FDA clearance
summary: Developed with Edwards Lifesciences, DeviceGuide is aimed at the challenging task of transcatheter mitral valve repair.
summary_ko: Philips의 AI 카테터 실험실 코파일럿이 FDA 승인을 받았습니다. 이는 의료기기 기술의 발전에 중요한 단계입니다.

title: STAT+: Data show people racing to chatbots for health advice
summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: More people use chatbots for health advice, a health AI startup raises $125 million, and all about deepfaked medical images.
summary_ko: 사람들이 건강 상담을 위해 챗봇을 사용하는 것이 증가하고 있다.

title: Beam posts positive data on base editing treatment for AATD
summary: Updated data showed the biotech's approach to the rare lung and liver condition helped restore functional protective proteins in a small study.
summary_ko: Beam의 베이스 에디팅 치료법이 AATD 환자에서 긍정적인 결과를 보여주었다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: Sarepta의 RNAi 신약이 초기 성공을 거두었으며, 두 가지 약물이 근무약화 질환을 치료할 수 있는 잠재력을 보였다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 17억 달러를 투자하고, 자가면역질환 치료를 위한 비스펙티프 항체 개발에 집중하고 있습니다.

title: OrbiMed-backed Pinnacle adds $89M series B to power oral peptide pipeline
summary: Oral peptide specialist Pinnacle Medicines has secured an $89 million series B with backing from investors in the U.S. and China, bringing the company’s total fundraising haul to $134 million.
summary_ko: OrbiMed-backed Pinnacle Medicines는 구강 펩타이드 파이프라인 개발을 위한 8900만 달러의 시리즈 B 자금을 조달했습니다.
